rules.title: Income limit table, 60% MTSP, household sizes 1-6
rules.text: To live in a home funded by this program, the money everyone in your household earns together in a year (before taxes) is compared against a published limit. The limit depends on how many people live with you. ALL NUMBERS BELOW ARE PLACEHOLDERS and must never be presented as official.

rules.title: What income is counted
rules.text: Count the money each adult in the household expects to earn over the next 12 months before taxes. This includes wages from a job (gross pay) and regular benefit payments. PLACEHOLDER summary - the official counting rules will replace this text.

citation.official_source: PLACEHOLDER - to be replaced by frozen rule corpus (realdoor-hackathon-starter-pack/rules/rule_corpus.jsonl)

rules.title: How pay is annualized
rules.text: Pay is converted to a yearly amount using the pay schedule: weekly pay times 52, biweekly (every two weeks) times 26, semimonthly (twice a month) times 24, monthly times 12. If the pay schedule is unknown, the yearly amount cannot be computed. PLACEHOLDER summary - the official method text will replace this.
